User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in Kaki Malaysia.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The URL to the user's profile picture.

ethnicity.description: The user's ethnicity (e.g., Malay, Chinese, Indian, Iban, Kadazan, etc.).

religion.description: The user's religion (e.g., Islam, Buddhism, Christianity, Hinduism, Sikhism, etc.).

bio.description: A short bio about the user.

interests.description: Cultures the user is interested in exploring.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the event.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

location.description: The physical location or address of the event.

organizerId.description: The UID of the user who organized the event.

category.description: The category of the event (e.g., MakanKaki, Festival, Religious, Cultural, Community, JalanKaki, SembangKaki).

kakiTag.description: Specific Kaki tag (e.g., DurianKaki, JalanKaki, SembangKaki, MakanKaki).

ethnicityTag.description: The primary ethnicity associated with the event.

religionTag.description: The primary religion associated with the event (if any).

price.description: The price of the event in RM.

isPartnerEvent.description: Whether the event is organized by a community partner.

instagramLink.description: Link to the partner's Instagram profile.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the event's photo.

rating.description: The average rating of the event.

attendees.description: A list of UIDs of users attending the event.
